title: キングちゃんとがんばる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as the Tracen Meet draws near, I'm
eating lunch, when...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Mmhmm! Today's carrots are just as yummy as
ever!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll have some carrot ice cream next and a ton
more carrots for dinner!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Urara! You can't just gorge yourself on
all those carrots!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Why not? This is how much I normally eat!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're always like this... You could at least try to live up to your role as the roommate of a first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's true! There's a whole bunch I can learn from
you, King! You're, like, super-duper awesome!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahem... I'll admit that your eye for talent is almost first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However! It is precisely because you're so close to
greatness that you must be more conscious of
your body mass!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Body... math?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Body mass. If we are to stay in first-rate condition, we need to be conscious of our weight as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And yet! Despite the Tracen Meet being right
around the corner, you're feasting on carrots with
abandon!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Mmm... I guess you're probably right, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I always feel better when I eat the food I love!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Even if I work on my body math, I can't run well if
I don't feel good!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What are we going to do with you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Though I suppose there's something to admire in
your carefree attitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I'm still a bit worried. So, how about
we...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... King, wait for meeee!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not. I have given you the privilege of
training with me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't be lazy. We're going to run till you burn off
every calorie.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. If you're here with me, then I'm gonna
try my best!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Now, keep your head up and
dash forward!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Head up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: URARARARARAAAA!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You dummy! I didn't say look up at the sky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the two racers continue to joyfully run
about, right up until track closing time.
